Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be performed after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time until SW-EIC Reject is performed in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-EIC Reject following the completion of all assigned reviewers’ agreements (i.e., after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed in a case)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from the first SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject in cases with multiple reviewer agreements
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation and SW-EIC Reject in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time for SW-EIC Reject grouped by the number of preceding SW-Reviewer Agreed events in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time between the final SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-EIC Reject across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time of SW-EIC Reject relative to the initial manuscript submission confirmation in variants that pass through SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-EIC Reject in variants containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-EIC Reject after the last required SW-Reviewer Agreed is recorded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-EIC Reject in cases where at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-EIC Reject in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be done after SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in rejected manuscripts that progressed through reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-EIC Reject in variants involving SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-EIC Reject in trajectories that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time of SW-EIC Reject in relation to the earliest occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time from the first reviewer invitation (implied by SW-AE Assign Reviewers) to SW-EIC Reject in cases concluding with rejection after reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Selection is now due and SW-EIC Reject in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'
